title: justicia flaviflora
intro: Justicia flaviflora, also known as the yellow justicia, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia flaviflora include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
